## Checklist
- [ ] CI passes (backend smoke test + frontend build)
- [ ] No `.env` or secrets committed
- [ ] No `node_modules` or build artifacts committed
- [ ] Code follows existing style (ES Modules, 2-space indent, TypeScript strict)
- [ ] PR is scoped to one concern — not mixing unrelated changes
- [ ] Relevant documentation updated (README, CHANGELOG, inline comments)
